---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: ['enhancement']
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you'd like the feature to work. Include:
- API/config changes (if any)
- Expected behavior
- Edge cases to consider

## Alternatives Considered

What alternative solutions have you considered? Why did you choose this approach?

## Implementation Notes (optional)

If you have ideas about how to implement this, share them here.

## Additional Context

Links to relevant issues, PRs, or external resources.
